talks.title: Detecting GenAI Threats at Scale with YARA-Like Semantic Rules
talks.description: Presenting a novel approach to detecting GenAI-powered threats using semantic rules inspired by YARA, enabling scalable, interpretable detection of AI-generated malicious content.

talks.title: CTI Agent: Automated Battlecards from CTI Reports
talks.description: Demonstrating an autonomous CTI agent that reads threat intelligence reports and automatically generates structured battlecards for security analysts, reducing manual analysis time dramatically.

talks.title: Deep Dive into the Abuse of DL APIs to Create Malicious AI Models and How to Detect Them
talks.description: Comprehensive analysis of how attackers abuse deep learning APIs (Hugging Face, etc.) to distribute malicious AI models, and detection techniques using behavioral and structural analysis.
